title: [phase:repair] [family:verification] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Review the prototype tests and propose the next 4 verification additions needed before canary. Keep it concise. No edits.
summary_text: Smallest safe change in [notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml): 1. Remove side-effecting issue comments in `finalize` (`gh issue comment` at lines `139-146`). 2. Keep `finalize`, but write the same status into `GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY` instead. 3. Tighten workflow permissions from `issues: write` to `issues: read` (line `18`). Why this is minimal and safe: - It eliminates issue/PR comment side effects entirely. - It preserves production smoke value: runtime gate, protected env run, and artifact upload remain unchanged. Likely test updates in [test-notebooklm-runtime-smoke.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-notebooklm-runtime-smoke.sh): 1. Add assertion for `issues: read` (not `write`). 2. Add negative assertion that workflow does not contain `gh issue comment`. 3. Add positive assertion that `finalize` writes to `GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY` (or equivalent summary marker). Kernel policy note: this is a single Codex critique lane; run Claude/GLM sidecar review before merge for full council compliance.
